main.description: Fetch a foreign ATProto record on demand. Resolves the URI's DID to its `#atproto_pds` service, calls `com.atproto.repo.getRecord`, persists the result into `external_records`, and returns the imported view. Use this to lift one-off records from apps the indexer is not subscribed to (e.g. a single Bluesky video post, a Skylight clip, a Bluemotion video) into Layers without enabling a firehose subscription for the whole namespace.

uri.description: AT-URI of the record to import.

fresh.description: When true, bypass the local cache and refetch from the source PDS.

fromCache.description: True when served from `external_records` without a network fetch.

value.description: Foreign record body as published by the source.
